title: System and method for worksite operation optimization based on operator conditions
abstract: Systems and methods (500) for optimizing worksite (10) operations based on operator conditions are disclosed. One method (500) includes receiving first data (404) including one or more of a worksite (10) model and information relating to actual operation of a worksite (10), wherein the worksite (10) model includes a simulated operation of a machine (12) associated with the worksite (10). Second data (626) may be received, the second data (414) associated with an operator of a machine (12) at the worksite (10) and including one or more of nutritional data, health data, and sleep data. An operation state may be determined based at least on the first data (404) and the second data (414). A response may be generated based at least on the determined operation state.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A method (500) comprising: receiving, by one or more processors (610), first data (404) comprising one or more of a worksite (10) model and information relating to actual operation of a worksite (10), wherein the worksite (10) model comprises a simulated operation of a machine (12) associated with the worksite (10); receiving, by the one or more processors (610), second data (414) associated with an operator of a machine (12) at the worksite ( 10), the second data (414) comprising one or more of nutritional data, health data, and sleep data; determining, by the one or more processors (610), an operation state based at least on the first data (404) and the second data (414); and generating a response based at least on the determined operation state. 2. The method (500) of claim 1, further comprising transmitting the response to the operator. 3. The method (500) of claim 1, wherein the first data (404) comprises the worksite (10) model and further comprising updating the worksite (10) model based at least on the generated response, 4. The method (500) of claim 1 , wherein the second data (414) is received from a sensor (20) integrated with the machine (12). 5. The method (500) of claim 1, wherein the second data (626) is received from a sensor (20) disposed adjacent the operator. 6. The method (500) of claim 1, wherein the determining the operation state comprises one or more of detecting an irregularity in site operations, detecting an inefficiency in site operations, and detecting an operator warning condition. 7. The method (500) of claim 1 , wherein the determining the operation state comprises detecting an operator warning condition and wherein the response comprises a remediation to the operator warning condition. 8. The method (500) of claim 1 , wherein the response comprises one or more of an audible indicator and a visual indicator. 9. A system comprising: a processor (610); and a memory bearing instructions that, upon execution by the processor (610), cause the system at least to: receive first data (404) comprising one or more of a worksite (10) model and information relating to actual operation of a worksite (10), wherein the worksite (10) model comprises a simulated operation of a machine (12) associated with the worksite (10); receive second data (414) associated with an operator of a machine ( 12) at the worksite (10), the second data (414) comprising one or more of nutritional data, health data, and sleep data; determine an operation state based at least on the first data (404) and the second data (414); and generate a response based at least on the determined operation state. 10. The system of claim 9, wherein the first data (404) comprises the worksite (10) model and further comprising updating the worksite (10) model based at least on the generated response.
